overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in white armor exploring a misty grassland with autumn foliage and floating red particles. The character walks along a path transitioning from open fields to rocky terrain and ancient stone ruins.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open grassland, passing wooden fence on the left side

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running parallel to the path on the left side
large tree with distinctive golden-orange autumn foliage
large rocky cliff formation visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through an open grassland area with a wooden fence on the left. The landscape features tall grass, scattered bushes, and a prominent golden-orange tree ahead. Red glowing particles float in the overcast air, and a large rock formation looms in the distance on the right.

events.description: path narrows as character moves alongside large rock cliff wall on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along a dirt path with rock wall on the right and open vegetation on the left

entered.detail: tall gray rock cliff face forming a wall along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a narrowing dirt path with a massive rock cliff wall now dominating the right side. The wooden fence falls behind as the terrain becomes more enclosed. The golden-orange trees shift to the left side of the frame while the path continues forward through the mixed grass and rock terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed trail between rock wall and dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrower path with rock wall on the right and dense bushes on the left

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed between the persistent rock cliff on the right and denser vegetation on the left. The ground transitions to rockier terrain with scattered boulders. The golden-orange trees recede into the background as the character continues along the winding trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins with wooden debris

events.description: character approaches a Site of Grace checkpoint, interaction prompt appears briefly

agents.ego_description: walking through stone ruins and approaching a Site of Grace checkpoint on a stone platform

entered.detail: ancient stone platform and ruins with weathered blocks and broken structures
broken wooden beams and debris scattered among the stone ruins
glowing checkpoint site with interaction prompt visible briefly

segments.scene_description: The character enters an area of ancient stone ruins with broken wooden beams scattered about. The ground becomes stone pavement as the character approaches and passes a Site of Grace checkpoint. The rock cliff and grassy terrain fall away, revealing a stone platform overlooking a distant valley with the golden trees now far in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty grassland that gradually narrows into a rocky corridor before opening onto ancient stone ruins. It begins with the character walking past a wooden fence through open fields of tall grass and floating red particles, heading toward a prominent golden-orange tree. As the character moves forward, the landscape becomes more enclosed, with the fence falling away and a massive rock cliff wall rising to dominate the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts as the dirt path winds through denser vegetation and scattered boulders, causing the golden trees to recede into the background. Finally, the terrain transitions from grass to stone pavement as the character enters a ruined complex of broken beams and a Site of Grace, ending on a stone platform that overlooks a distant valley.
